title: pedilonum geluanum
intro: Pedilonum geluanum, also known as the Geluana or Geluan Plant, is a species of plant native to tropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pedilonum geluanum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by creating a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
